o L,) 0 I 
State of California 
Memorandum 
To 
: File 
Date 
tvlarch 6, 1978 
From 
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
Ted Prim 
Subject: Disposition of Appeals 
At the January 1978, meeting, the Commission directed the 
Conflicts of Interest Committee to hear all appeals from 
designated employees prior to bringing such appeals to the 
full Commission. 
This procedure will enable the Committee 
to crystalize 
major issues and build a record. 
The hope 
is that the 
ing before the full Commission would be more 
ef cient. 
TP:mfa

sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an internal memorandum, not an advice letter responding to a legal question. No question or conclusion sections present. Document outlines procedural directive regarding appeal handling.

embedding.summary: Internal FPPC memorandum documenting a Commission directive from January 1978 requiring the Conflicts of Interest Committee to hear all appeals from designated employees before escalation to the full Commission.
